## LibraryData.IRuntimeCollection.sourceItem property

Reference to the source FileTree item for persistence. When present and the FileTree supports persistence, changes can be saved back to the file. This is file-level mutability separate from application-level mutability.

**Signature:**

```typescript
readonly sourceItem: FileTree.FileTreeItem;
```
